TheApprentice:Planned.name: Planned
TheApprentice:Planned.description: When a card becomes [gold]Planned[/gold], it also becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold]. Some cards can play all Planned cards in the order they were planned.
TheApprentice:Intense.name: Intense
TheApprentice:Intense.description: Becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold] after being played once. Can still be played via [gold]Planned[/gold].
TheApprentice:Unplayable.name: Unplayable
